input: tutor: You are wrong about this.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I'm afraid I see it differently. / I respectfully disagree with you on this point. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Direct Disagreement   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Noi thang 'You are wrong' trong tieng Anh rat de gay ton thuong va uoc coi la tho lo. Nguoi ban xu thuong lam mem cau bang cach bay to quan iem cua minh thay vi tan cong nguoi khac. Hay dung 'I'm afraid...' (toi e rang), 'I see it differently' (toi thay khac), hoac 'I respectfully disagree' (toi kinh trong khong ong tinh). Nguoi Viet hay noi thang 'ban sai roi'  can tap thoi quen noi nhe nhang hon.

input: tutor: You must study harder.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** Have you considered studying a bit harder? / It might be beneficial to study more. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Forceful Advice (You must)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'You must' mang tinh ep buoc, ra lenh, rat de gay phan cam khi ua loi khuyen. Thay vao o, hay dung cau truc mem mai nhu 'Have you considered...?' (ban a can nhac chua?), 'It might be better if...' (co le tot hon neu...), hoac 'Perhaps you could...' (co le ban co the...). Nguoi Viet thuong noi 'ban phai hoc cham hon'  hay chuyen thanh goi y nhe nhang.

input: tutor: That's not a good idea.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I'm not sure that's the best idea. / Have you thought about the possible drawbacks? || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Direct Negative Judgment   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'That's not a good idea' phu inh truc tiep y tuong cua nguoi khac, co the khien ho mat mat. Cach lich su la bay to su khong chac chan hoac at cau hoi goi mo. Dung 'I'm not sure...' (toi khong chac), 'Have you considered...?' (ban a can nhac...?), hoac 'What about...?' Nguoi Viet nen tranh noi 'y tuong o khong hay' mot cach truc dien.

input: tutor: You need to lose weight.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** Have you thought about adopting a healthier lifestyle? / Maybe we could start exercising together. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Direct Advice on Sensitive Topic   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Loi khuyen ve ngoai hinh hoac suc khoe can cuc ky te nhi. 'You need to lose weight' nghe nhu chi trich. Hay ua ra goi y chung chung hoac e xuat hoat ong cung nhau. Dung 'Have you thought about...?' hoac 'I've found that... works for me.' Nguoi Viet co the noi thang 'ban can giam can'  hay tap noi kheo leo hon.

input: tutor: I don't agree with you.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I see your point, but I have a slightly different perspective. / That's interesting, however I tend to think that... || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Blunt Disagreement   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'I don't agree with you' tuy lich su hon 'you're wrong' nhung van kha truc dien. e nhe nhang hon, hay cong nhan y kien cua oi phuong truoc (I see your point), sau o ua ra quan iem khac. Them 'slightly', 'a little', 'perhaps' e lam mem. Nguoi Viet thuong noi 'toi khong ong y'  hay them phan khang inh truoc khi phan oi.

input: tutor: You should quit your job.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** Have you considered looking for other opportunities? / Maybe it's time to think about a career change. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Direct Advice on Major Life Decision   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Loi khuyen quyet inh lon nhu nghi viec khong nen ua ra duoi dang menh lenh 'you should'. Hay dung cau hoi goi y hoac chia se quan iem ca nhan. 'Have you considered...?' (ban a can nhac chua?) la cach an toan. Nguoi Viet hay noi 'ban nen nghi viec'  hay chuyen thanh 'ban co nghi en chuyen tim viec khac khong?'

input: tutor: You're making a mistake.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I'm concerned that this might lead to an unexpected outcome. / Have you double-checked all the details? || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Direct Accusation   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Noi ai o ang pham sai lam la rat nang loi. Thay vao o, hay bay to su lo lang hoac at cau hoi e ho tu nhan ra. Dung 'I'm concerned that...' (toi lo rang), 'Are you sure about...?', 'What if...?' Nguoi Viet noi 'ban ang sai'  hay tap noi 'ban co chac chan ve ieu o khong?' mot cach nhe nhang.

input: tutor: You have to listen to me.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I would really appreciate it if you could hear me out. / Could I share my perspective with you? || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Forceful Demand   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'You have to listen' mang tinh ap at, ra lenh. e yeu cau ai o lang nghe, hay dung cau hoi hoac bay to mong muon ca nhan. 'Would you mind listening for a moment?' hoac 'I'd appreciate your thoughts on this.' Nguoi Viet noi 'ban phai nghe toi'  hay chuyen thanh 'ban co the lang nghe toi mot chut uoc khong?'

input: tutor: That's stupid.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I see where you're coming from, but I have a different take on it. / That's an interesting perspective, though I'm not sure I agree. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Highly Impolite - Insulting Language   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'That's stupid' la xuc pham truc tiep, khong bao gio uoc dung trong giao tiep lich su. Thay vao o, hay the hien su khong ong tinh mot cach ton trong, thua nhan rang moi nguoi co quan iem rieng. Nguoi Viet tuyet oi tranh dich 'ngu ngoc' sang tieng Anh trong tranh luan. Hay noi 'I see it differently' hoac 'That's one way to look at it, but...'

input: tutor: You must apologize to her.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I think it would be a good idea to apologize to her. / Have you considered saying sorry? || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Forceful Advice (You must)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'You must apologize' la menh lenh, khong ton trong quyen tu quyet cua nguoi khac. Hay ua ra loi khuyen duoi dang goi y hoac cau hoi. 'I think it would be good to...', 'Perhaps you could...', 'Have you considered...?' Nguoi Viet noi 'ban phai xin loi'  hay noi 'co le ban nen xin loi thi tot hon?'

input: tutor: You are too young to understand.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I see your enthusiasm, but this might be something that comes with more experience. / Perhaps when you're older, you'll see it differently. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Dismissive and Condescending   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Phu inh ai o dua tren tuoi tac hoac kinh nghiem la thieu ton trong. Thay vao o, hay thua nhan quan iem cua ho va ua ra ly do mot cach nhe nhang. Dung 'I see your point, however...' hoac 'That's an interesting way to look at it.' Nguoi Viet nen tranh noi 'ban con tre qua khong hieu au'.

input: tutor: You don't know what you're talking about.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I think there might be some misunderstanding. / Could you clarify what you mean by that? || Hint: **Error Identification:** Highly Impolite - Direct Attack on Competence   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Cau nay cong kich truc tiep nang luc cua nguoi khac, cuc ky tho lo. Thay vao o, hay yeu cau lam ro hoac bay to su khong chac chan. 'I'm not sure I follow' (toi khong chac toi hieu), 'Could you explain more?' (ban co the giai thich them khong?). Nguoi Viet tuyet oi tranh dich 'ban khong biet gi ca'.

input: tutor: You should stop smoking.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** Have you thought about cutting down on smoking for your health? / I'm concerned about your health, perhaps you could consider quitting. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Direct Advice on Health   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Loi khuyen ve suc khoe nhay cam, nen uoc ua ra voi su quan tam thay vi ra lenh. Dung 'Have you considered...?' hoac 'I'm concerned that...' (toi lo rang). Tranh 'you should' vi nghe nhu ang phan xet. Nguoi Viet noi 'ban nen bo thuoc la'  hay noi 'toi lo cho suc khoe cua ban, ban co nghi en viec bo thuoc khong?'

input: tutor: I totally disagree with your opinion.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I see things a bit differently. / I respect your opinion, but I have another perspective. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Overly Strong Disagreement   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'Totally disagree' qua manh, co the gay xung ot. Hay lam mem bang cach noi 'I see things differently' (toi thay van e khac) hoac 'I respectfully disagree' (toi kinh trong khong ong tinh). Them 'a bit', 'slightly', 'perhaps' e giam cang thang. Nguoi Viet noi 'toi hoan toan khong ong y'  hay bot 'hoan toan' va them 'toi ton trong y kien cua ban nhung...'

input: tutor: You must do what I say.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I would really appreciate it if you could follow my instructions. / Could we work together on this? || Hint: **Error Identification:** Highly Impolite - Authoritarian Command   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'You must do what I say' la cach noi oc oan, khong phu hop trong moi truong ton trong lan nhau. Hay dung 'I would appreciate it if...' hoac bien thanh cau hoi. Ngay ca cap tren cung nen noi 'I'd like you to...' thay vi 'you must'. Nguoi Viet can tranh noi 'ban phai lam theo loi toi' trong giao tiep cong so.

input: tutor: You are being ridiculous.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I'm having a hard time understanding your point. / Could we look at this from another angle? || Hint: **Error Identification:** Impolite Tone - Insulting Label   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Goi ai o 'ridiculous' la xuc pham. Nguoi Viet tranh noi 'ban that lo bich'.

input: tutor: You need to change your attitude.

Nguoi Viet noi 'ban can thay oi thai o'  hay noi 'co le cach tiep can khac se tot hon'.

input: tutor: You should be more careful.

input: tutor: That's not true.

input: tutor: I think you're wrong.

input: tutor: You don't have enough experience for this job.

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Read a book." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Read a book" (tách rời /riːd ə bʊk/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Take it easy." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Take it easy" (tách rời /teɪk ɪt ˈiːzi/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Come over here." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Come over here" (tách rời /kʌm ˈəʊvər hɪər/).
target: **Corrected Pronunciation:** /ˈkʌmˈəʊvərɪər/ (nối 'm' với 'over', 'r' với 'here' – 'here' bắt đầu bằng /h/ phụ âm, nhưng 'over here' có thể nối 'r' với 'h'? Thường không nối. Tập trung: 'come over' → /kʌməʊvər/). || Hint: **Error Identification:** Khong noi 'm' voi 'over' (nguyen am //).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Let me in." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Let me in" (tách rời /let miː ɪn/).
target: **Corrected Pronunciation:** /ˈletmɪn/ (nối 't' với 'me'? 'me' bắt đầu bằng /m/ phụ âm, không phải nguyên âm. Nhưng 'let me' có thể nối 't' với 'm' thành /letm/. 'me in' nối /miːɪn/ thành /miːn/). Ở đây 'me in' → /miːn/ (nối /iː/ với /ɪ/ là nguyên âm với nguyên âm? Không, 'me' kết thúc bằng nguyên âm /iː/, 'in' bắt đầu bằng nguyên âm /ɪ/, có thể thêm âm /j/ để nối? Thực tế 'me in' nói nhanh thành 'meen'. Tuy nhiên, lỗi phổ biến là không nối 'let me'. || Hint: Grammatical or pronunciation error.

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "There is a car." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "There is a car" (tách rời /ðeər ɪz ə kɑːr/).
target: **Corrected Pronunciation:** /ðeəˈrɪzəkɑːr/ (nối 'r' của 'there' với 'is'? 'there' kết thúc bằng /ər/ có thể nối với 'is' thành /ðeərɪz/; 'is a' → /ɪzə/). || Hint: **Error Identification:** Khong noi 'r' voi 'is' (neu phat am co am /r/ cuoi) va 'z' voi 'a'.

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Call a friend." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Call a friend" (tách rời /kɔːl ə frend/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "I want an apple." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "I want an apple" (tách rời /aɪ wɒnt æn ˈæpəl/).
target: **Corrected Pronunciation:** /aɪˈwɒntəˈnæpəl/ (nối 't' với 'an', 'n' với 'apple'). || Hint: **Error Identification:** Khong noi 'want an'  /wntn/, 'an apple'  /npl/.

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Please open the door." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Please open the door" (tách rời /pliːz ˈəʊpən ðə dɔːr/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "He ate an egg." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "He ate an egg" (tách rời /hiː eɪt æn eɡ/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Where are they?" Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Where are they?" (tách rời /weər ɑː ðeɪ/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "I'm so tired." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "I'm so tired" (tách rời /aɪm səʊ taɪəd/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Let him in." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Let him in" (tách rời /let hɪm ɪn/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "I miss you." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "I miss you" (tách rời /aɪ mɪs juː/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Get a life." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Get a life" (tách rời /ɡet ə laɪf/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "I have to go." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "I have to go" (tách rời /aɪ hæv tuː ɡəʊ/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Want to go." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Want to go" (tách rời /wɒnt tuː ɡəʊ/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "Give it to me." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "Give it to me" (tách rời /ɡɪv ɪt tuː miː/).

input: tutor: Câu yêu cầu đọc: "I've got a lot of work." Văn bản Whisper nhận được: "I've got a lot of work" (tách rời /aɪv ɡɒt ə lɒt ɒv wɜːk/).

input: tutor: I like swimming, to run, and bike.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I like swimming, running, and biking. / I like to swim, to run, and to bike. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Faulty Parallelism (Tron lan danh ong tu, ong tu nguyen mau va danh tu)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Khi liet ke cac hoat ong voi 'and', cac thanh phan phai cung mot dang ngu phap. Cau tren tron 'swimming' (V-ing), 'to run' (to-infinitive), va 'bike' (danh tu)  gay roi. Hay chon mot dang: tat ca V-ing hoac tat ca to-infinitive. Nguoi Viet thuong mac loi nay vi nghi 'thich boi, chay, ap xe' la uoc. Hay nhat quan nhe!

input: tutor: She is kind, intelligent, and has a great sense of humor.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** She is kind, intelligent, and humorous. / She is kind, intelligent, and has a great sense of humor. (Không thể vì 'has' phá vỡ song song) || Hint: **Error Identification:** Faulty Parallelism (Tron tinh tu va cum ong tu)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Sau 'is', ban liet ke cac tinh tu: 'kind', 'intelligent'  nhung 'has a great sense of humor' la cum ong tu, khong cung loai. Hay sua thanh 'humorous' (tinh tu) hoac chuyen cau truc: 'She has kindness, intelligence, and a great sense of humor.'

input: tutor: He wants to learn English, find a job, and traveling abroad.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** He wants to learn English, find a job, and travel abroad. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Faulty Parallelism (Tron 'to learn', 'find' (bare infinitive sau want? thuc te 'to find' moi ung) va 'traveling')   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Sau 'wants', cac ong tu liet ke eu phai o dang 'to + V' (vi 'want' + to V). Cau goc co 'to learn' (ung), 'find' (thieu 'to'), va 'traveling' (sai). Hay sua thanh 'to learn, to find, and to travel' hoac 'learn, find, travel' neu dung 'can' nhung o ay dung 'wants'.

input: tutor: The movie was exciting, had great effects, and the acting was superb.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** The movie had exciting scenes, great effects, and superb acting. / The movie was exciting, had great effects, and featured superb acting. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Faulty Parallelism (Tron tinh tu, cum ong tu, va menh e)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Liet ke ba ac iem cua phim nhung dang khong ong nhat: 'was exciting' (tinh tu), 'had great effects' (ong tu), 'the acting was superb' (ca menh e). Hay chon mot cau truc chung.

input: tutor: She can sing beautifully, dance graceful, and plays the piano well.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** She can sing beautifully, dance gracefully, and play the piano well. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Faulty Parallelism (Sau 'can', cac ong tu phai o dang nguyen mau khong 'to', va trang tu phai ong nhat)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'Can' + V (nguyen mau). Cau goc: 'sing' (ung), 'dance' (ung nhung thieu 'gracefully' thay vi 'graceful'  trang tu), 'plays' (sai vi them 's'). Sua thanh 'play' va 'gracefully'.

input: tutor: He is not only smart but also he is hardworking.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** He is not only smart but also hardworking. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Faulty Parallelism voi cap 'not only... but also'   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Cau truc 'not only A but also B' yeu cau A va B cung loai. O ay A = 'smart' (tinh tu), B = 'he is hardworking' (ca menh e)  khong can bang. Hay bo 'he is' e B la 'hardworking' (tinh tu).

input: tutor: I want to watch a movie at the cinema.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I want to **see** a movie at the cinema. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Confusing Words (See vs Watch)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Ca 'see' va 'watch' eu lien quan en thi giac, nhung 'see' dung khi ban en rap chieu phim e thuong thuc mot bo phim (nhan manh trai nghiem tong the). 'Watch' thuong dung cho viec theo doi mot thu gi o di chuyen hoac thay oi (watch TV, watch a football match). Nguoi Viet hay dich 'xem phim' thanh 'watch movie'  thuc ra ca hai eu uoc chap nhan, nhung 'see a movie' pho bien hon trong tieng Anh-My khi noi en rap chieu. Meo: **see** = thuong thuc (trai nghiem), **watch** = chu y theo doi (thuong o nha).

input: tutor: Can you look the board?
target: **Corrected Sentence:** Can you **look at** the board? || Hint: **Error Identification:** Confusing Words (Look vs See vs Watch) - Thieu gioi tu   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'Look' la ong tu huong su chu y, nhung bat buoc phai co gioi tu 'at' khi i kem tan ngu (look at something). 'See' la nhin thay mot cach tu nhien, khong chu ich. Nguoi Viet thuong noi 'look the board' vi dich 'nhin cai bang' ma quen 'at'. Hay nho: **look at** (chu ong huong mat), **see** (thu ong).

input: tutor: I listened to music but I didn't hear anything special.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I listened to music but I didn't hear anything special. (Câu này đúng!) || Hint: **Error Identification:** Khong co loi. ay la cach phan biet 'listen' (chu ong nghe) va 'hear' (thu ong nghe thay).   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Tuyet voi! Ban a dung ung: 'listen to' la co y chu y lang nghe, con 'hear' la tinh co nghe thay. Nguoi Viet thuong nham khi noi 'I heard to music' (sai). Hay nho: **listen + to** (chu ong), **hear** (khong chu ong).

input: tutor: Please hear me when I'm talking.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** Please **listen to** me when I'm talking. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Confusing Words (Hear vs Listen)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'Hear' la nghe thay (vo tinh), 'listen to' la lang nghe (co chu y). Khi ban yeu cau ai o chu y en loi noi cua minh, phai dung 'listen to'. Nguoi Viet thuong noi 'hear me' vi dich 'nghe toi' nhung nghia la 'co nghe thay giong toi khong?'. Hay nho: **listen to** = chu y, **hear** = chi am thanh lot vao tai.

input: tutor: She said me a secret.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** She **told** me a secret. || Hint: **Error Identification:** Confusing Words (Say vs Tell)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'Say' thuong i kem voi noi dung loi noi (say something) va khong co tan ngu chi nguoi ngay sau. 'Tell' bat buoc phai co tan ngu chi nguoi (tell someone something). Nguoi Viet hay noi 'say me' vi dich 'noi toi'. Hay nho: **tell + nguoi**, **say + noi dung** (hoac say to someone).

input: tutor: Can you borrow me your pen?
target: **Corrected Sentence:** Can you **lend** me your pen? (Hoặc: Can I borrow your pen?) || Hint: **Error Identification:** Confusing Words (Borrow vs Lend)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'Borrow' la muon (nhan ve), 'lend' la cho muon (ua ra). Nguoi Viet hay noi 'borrow me' vi nghi 'muon toi' nhung sai. Hay nho: **You borrow from someone; you lend to someone.** Meo: 'lend' co chu 'l' giong 'loan' (cho vay).

input: tutor: We need to discuss about the plan.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** We need to discuss the plan. (Không có 'about') || Hint: **Error Identification:** Confusing Words (Discuss vs Talk about)   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'Discuss' la ong tu ngoai (transitive), khong can gioi tu. 'Talk about' lai can 'about'. Nguoi Viet thuong them 'about' sau 'discuss' vi dich 'thao luan ve'. Hay nho: **discuss something** (khong about), **talk about something**.

input: tutor: I want to speak you about something.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I want to **talk to** you about something. (Hoặc 'speak to you') || Hint: **Error Identification:** Confusing Words (Speak vs Talk) - Thieu gioi tu   **Vietnamese Explanation:** 'Speak' va 'talk' eu can gioi tu khi co tan ngu la nguoi: speak **to/with** someone, talk **to/with** someone. Nguoi Viet thuong bo gioi tu vi nghi 'noi ban'. Hay nho: **speak to/with, talk to/with**.

input: tutor: I saw a bird flying, then I looked at it carefully.
target: **Corrected Sentence:** I saw a bird flying, then I looked at it carefully. (Câu đúng) || Hint: **Error Identification:** Khong loi. Ban phan biet rat tot 'see' (nhin thay tu nhien) va 'look at' (chu ong).   **Vietnamese Explanation:** Tuyet voi! ay chinh la cach dung chuan. 'See' la thu en voi mat ban mot cach thu ong, 'look at' la ban chu ong huong mat. Ban a lam rat ung.

input: tutor: Please say me the truth.
